Proprietary lab solvency is directly tied to covering its total annual costs (burn + amortized training).
Enterprise LLM adoption demands a holistic "production moat" encompassing data governance, security, compliance, managed tooling, and operational resilience, beyond raw model performance.
Hyperscalers leverage existing, amortized global infrastructure and enterprise trust to offer these "production moat" features for LLMs at marginal incremental cost.
Hyperscalers achieve high aggregate GPU utilization rates (80-90%) for provisioned capacity, enabling low COMPUTE_PER_MTOK costs.
